caption: A man wearing glasses, a white button-down shirt, a red bowtie, tan suspenders, and a tall, gray, textured wig sits in a studio setting. He is wearing black headphones and is positioned behind a black microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with several framed photographs and a rack of clothing. On-screen graphics are visible, including a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and text that says "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, looking slightly to his left with a neutral expression. There is very little movement between the frames, as he remains stationary while speaking or listening, with only slight shifts in his facial expression and head posture.
